{{Quote|… and you killed Ocheron, one of their strongest warriors.|Teneniel Djo, to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />}}
'''Ocheron''' was a member of the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] clan of the Witches of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. She was skilled in the art of deception and proved it by luring [[Teneniel Djo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] into a trap. Ocheron nearly killed Djo with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]], and would have been successful had Skywalker not [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] her.<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />
